name: Finexa – Fintech Web Platform
desc: Multi-module fintech SPA built with React.js and Node.js. Features secure OAuth 2.0 & JWT authentication, role-based CRM dashboards with real-time reporting, RESTful API integration, AWS S3 storage, and CI/CD pipelines. Query optimisation reduced page load times by ~40%.

name: Custom CRM & Lead Management System
desc: Role-based CRM built from scratch using React.js and Laravel. Features automated lead status workflows, real-time reporting, full CRUD modules, and REST API integration — reducing manual sales follow-up and improving pipeline visibility for operations teams.

name: eCommerce Storefront & Admin Portal
desc: Full-featured eCommerce platform built with React.js, Node.js, Laravel, and MySQL. Includes product catalogue management, cart, checkout, order tracking, payment gateway integration, and AWS S3 for media storage.

name: E-Learning Platform
desc: Scalable e-learning application built with PHP, React.js, and REST APIs. Features course management, quizzes, and interactive student/instructor dashboards with end-to-end RESTful API integration.

name: College Management Portals
desc: Multi-role college management portals (attendance, fee, academics) built using CodeIgniter, Laravel, and PHP. Features RBAC, payment gateway integration, and reusable component architecture across multiple university clients.

name: Onbroda
desc: A React.js SPA that showcases onboarding screen designs from various popular apps — built to demonstrate UI/UX patterns and responsive component design.

name: PASHU / ICTRD
desc: An e-learning platform for Solapur University built with CodeIgniter — similar to Udemy/Coursera. Features student enrollment, course management, and a learning progress tracker for the Indian Council for Technical Research & Development.

name: Symbiosis University Hospital (SUHRC)
desc: Hospital management system built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, PHP, Bootstrap, and MySQL. Features OPD scheduling, doctor management, SMTP email notifications, and patient data management.

name: Vascon
desc: Laravel-based web application with a fully custom admin dashboard. All content is dynamically managed via backend APIs with a MySQL database — enabling non-technical admins to manage the site independently.

name: JoshiJampla Engineering Pvt Ltd
desc: WordPress website for an engineering firm with third-party lead capture API integration, custom plugin development, and a tailored contact workflow for B2B enquiry management.

name: InCred Asset Management
desc: WordPress website built with Elementor, Contact Form with LeadSquared CRM integration, and responsive menu plugins — tailored for a financial asset management brand.

name: The Minimal Thinking
desc: Digital marketing agency website built on WordPress with custom-designed themes, tailored CSS animations, and JavaScript enhancements for a modern, minimal brand identity.

name: Veko Care
desc: WordPress WooCommerce e-commerce store for a healthcare/wellness brand with custom product pages, cart flow, and responsive design.

name: Live Happy
desc: WordPress website for a wellbeing and gym installation company — featuring service showcases, enquiry forms, and a clean responsive layout focused on user experience.

name: URBANBED
desc: Shopify e-commerce storefront for a furniture/home decor brand. Customised theme, product collections, and optimised checkout experience.
